summary: Frontend code review and testing completed for Camera/Gallery buttons in Visit Form Page 4 (Croquis/Fotos section). The bug fix has been properly implemented using useRef pattern instead of document.getElementById.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED FIX: VisitaPagina4.jsx uses useRef for cameraInputRef and galleryInputRef (lines 28-29)
VERIFIED FIX: handleOpenCamera and handleOpenGallery properly call ref.current?.click() (lines 36-42)
VERIFIED FIX: Hidden inputs have refs attached: ref={cameraInputRef} and ref={galleryInputRef} (lines 207, 217)
VERIFIED FIX: Buttons have data-testid attributes: croquis-camera-btn and croquis-gallery-btn (lines 246, 256)
VERIFIED FIX: Buttons have onClick handlers connected to the ref click functions (lines 245, 255)
VERIFIED FIX: VisitaFormModal.jsx Page4 component also uses useRef pattern with data-testid: croquis-camera-btn-modal and croquis-gallery-btn-modal (lines 563-564, 696-706)
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Camera and Gallery buttons in the Croquis/Fotos section (Page 4) of the visit form have been fixed. The fix uses useRef pattern which is more robust than document.getElementById. Both VisitaPagina4.jsx (used by VisitaFormContainer) and Page4 component inside VisitaFormModal.jsx have the fix applied. The buttons have proper data-testid attributes for automated testing.

croquis_camera_button.details: VisitaPagina4.jsx line 246: data-testid='croquis-camera-btn' with onClick={handleOpenCamera}. handleOpenCamera calls cameraInputRef.current?.click(). Hidden input has ref={cameraInputRef} with capture='environment' for mobile camera.

croquis_gallery_button.details: VisitaPagina4.jsx line 256: data-testid='croquis-gallery-btn' with onClick={handleOpenGallery}. handleOpenGallery calls galleryInputRef.current?.click(). Hidden input has ref={galleryInputRef} with multiple attribute for multi-file selection.

modal_camera_button.details: VisitaFormModal.jsx line 697: data-testid='croquis-camera-btn-modal' with onClick={() => croquisCameraRef.current?.click()}. Hidden input has ref={croquisCameraRef}.

modal_gallery_button.details: VisitaFormModal.jsx line 706: data-testid='croquis-gallery-btn-modal' with onClick={() => croquisGalleryRef.current?.click()}. Hidden input has ref={croquisGalleryRef}.

VisitaPagina4.jsx.useRef_declarations: lines 28-29: const cameraInputRef = useRef(null); const galleryInputRef = useRef(null);
VisitaPagina4.jsx.hidden_inputs: lines 206-223: File inputs with refs attached
VisitaPagina4.jsx.buttons: lines 242-262: Buttons with data-testid and onClick handlers

VisitaFormModal.jsx.hidden_inputs: lines 651-666: File inputs with refs attached
VisitaFormModal.jsx.buttons: lines 693-711: Buttons with data-testid and inline onClick

navigation_path_to_test: Login -> Proyectos -> Ver Project -> Visor de Predios (or direct URL /dashboard/visor-actualizacion/{projectId}) -> Click predio on map -> Registrar Visita -> Navigate to Page 4 -> Croquis/Fotos section
